final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand identity showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" fragrance brand, displaying primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "东方美学" aesthetic with autumnal warmth — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-and-color tradition, 故宫文创 contemporary palette work, 老上海月份牌 commercial illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand identity specification layout with clear sections for primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, and typography showcase
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" prominently
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must be autumn-inspired with warm, muted tones reflecting osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, and amber notes
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)" (brand name), "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" (core fragrance names), color specification labels, typography specimen text
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the Eastern philosophical brand identity and seasonal autumn theme
Avoid: must avoid Western-centric color naming systems as primary labels
